answers: Game theory: mathematical study of strategic decision-making. Nash equilibrium, prisoner's dilemma.
Learning game theory builds strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Game Theory is applied in many real-world fields. Understanding basics helps in any career.
Start with game theory fundamentals, practice with examples, and apply to real problems.
